message:
chore: ignore .DS_Store files at all directory levels

macOS generates .DS_Store files in every directory that Finder visits.
Add both root-level and recursive glob patterns to prevent accidental
commits of these OS metadata files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -20,3 +20,7 @@ perf.data
 # Alternative target directories
 target-local/
 target-*/
+
+# OS junk
+.DS_Store
+**/.DS_Store
